title: TreeLaplacianWords
summary: Defines rank-general left-comb indices and evaluates the associated nested multilinear Laplacian word.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines rank-general left-comb indices and evaluates the associated nested multilinear Laplacian word.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in PolyGJMSoperators/TreeLaplacianWords.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: left Comb Vertex Count. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Data/interface: Comb Index. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: Poly Tree Index. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: total Power. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def totalPower {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) : ℕ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: total Power eq. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem totalPower_eq {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) : I.totalPower = k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: power At. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def powerAt {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) (i : ℕ) : ℕ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: power At of fin. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem powerAt_of_fin {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : I.powerAt v.val = I.power v

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: add At. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def addAt {r s : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r s) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : CombIndex r (s + 1)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: add At power same. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem addAt_power_same {r s : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r s) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : (I.addAt v).power v = I.power v + 1

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: add At power ne. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem addAt_power_ne {r s : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r s) {v x : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)} (hxv : x ≠ v) : (I.addAt v).power x = I.power x

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: multinomial Coeff Q. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def multinomialCoeffQ {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: left Comb Eval From. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def leftCombEvalFrom (CalConf : Calculus Conf) : (r : ℕ) → (ℕ → ℕ) → CalConf.MultiInput r → Function Conf | 0, _p, _F => zero Conf | 1, p, F => CalConf.lapPow (p 0) (F 0) | r + 2, p, F => let leftInput : CalConf.MultiInput (r + 1)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: to Operator. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def toOperator {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) (CalConf : Calculus Conf) : CalConf.MultiOperator r

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: to Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem toOperator_apply {r k : ℕ} (I : CombIndex r k) (F : CalConf.MultiInput r) : I.toOperator CalConf F = leftCombEvalFrom CalConf r I.powerAt F

references.locator: Main ambient construction and tangentiality results
references.note: Motivation for rank-general nested Laplacian words; the Lean tree complex goes beyond what is currently instantiated.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
